title: Loche Crestingsky
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:LocheCrestingsky.png]] |name=Loche Crestingsky |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Crazed Droids|Tansarii Point Station}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Gray |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|A marksman! I'd like to talk to Loche.''"
"''Very good. He's tracking down some serious problems here.|A spacer and [[Inaldra/Legends|Inaldra's]] [[Inaldra's Lieutenant|Lieutenant]]|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Speak to Inaldra's Lieutenant to Get Work|Tansarii Point Station}}}} '''Loche Crestingsky''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sniper/Legends|marksman]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Those droids seem to have gone haywire. We need to understand what happened to them.|Loche Crestingsky, to a spacer|}} Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Loche Crestingsky resided on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. He worked out of the ranged combat training room as the combat instructor for Tansarii Point's guards.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Stopping the Slicers|Tansarii Point Station}} [[File:Tansarii_Point_Station_Droid_Repair_Center.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Malfunctioning droids in the Droid Repair Center of Tansarii Point Station]] In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} Crestingsky was very concerned about malfunctioning [[Droid/Legends|droids]] on the lower level of Tansarii Point Station that were becoming violent and increasingly hostile towards the inhabitants of the station. The marksman therefore hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to deal with this problem. Crestingsky first tasked the spacer to disable a number of droids to recover their [[memory module]]s. The spacer later came back with the modules and Loche sent them to the Tansarii Point's engineers for study. The droid [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] who analyzed the memory modules discovered that the droids had been [[Slicer/Legends|sliced]] but he was not able to find more clues. The engineer thus requested Crestingsky and the spacer to find an intact droid [[Central processor/Legends|central processing core]]. The spacer therefore returned to the lower level and fought again some malfunctioning droids to recover a droid central chip.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Recover a Droid Central Chip|Tansarii Point Station}} The engineer finally found evidences that the droids were sliced by [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. Loche then realized that the sabotage of the droids was just a diversion for a wider Black Sun operation. In the meantime, a group of Black Sun slicers had infiltrated Tansarii Point Station and were attempting to slice into the main [[Memory bank/Legends|databanks]] of the station. The spacer therefore rushed to the data storage room on the lower level of the station and indeed found a group of Black Sun pirates slicing into the main security system. In the ensuring firefight, the spacer was able to eliminate most the slicers and even killed their leader, the master slicer. The spacer eventually returned to Loche Crestingsky who rewarded him with [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and a weapon from his collection. ==Behind the scenes== Loche Crestingsky was a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} Loche Crestingsky was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}} ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Crazed Droids}} *{{SWGWiki|Practicing with Ranged Weapons}} *{{SWGWiki|Recover a Droid Central Chip}} *{{SWGWiki|Stopping the Slicers}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Crestingsky, Loche}} [[Category:Combat instructors and training officers]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Sharpshooters and snipers]] [[Category:Tansarii Point Station residents]]
